infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NextSport uses your camera to record swing videos for AI coaching analysis. Videos are uploaded securely and used only for your personal analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NextSport uses your microphone to capture audio when recording swing videos. Audio is included in your video upload and used only for analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NextSport accesses your photo library so you can select an existing swing video for AI analysis. Only the video you choose is accessed — your other photos are never browsed or stored.

plugins.cameraPermission: NextSport uses your camera to record swing videos for AI coaching analysis. Videos are used only for your personal analysis.
plugins.microphonePermission: NextSport uses your microphone to capture audio when recording swing videos. Audio is used only for your personal analysis.
